posited in between the significator of father & mother i.e. in II th
to the Moon & in 12 the to Ravi, the Planets responsible for
Money, Land and Profit are posited, the native willin her it the
parents' property. Sometimes, there would be litigations but still
it will be beneficial.
It should be understood that as the planets Kuja + Sukra
+ Guru are posited behind the father Ravi in south, it amounts
that the wealth is earned by father. These planets are posited in
2 to Moon the mother. Sani is posited in Mesha (East). The
nd
2 house to East is south. with this reason the native will inherit
the parents' property.

96 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADl ASTROLOGY
JYOTHISHA
What is Jyothlsha?
"Jyothi" means the Soul Power in every body is itself
called Jyothi. The elucidation of this Jyothi is known as Jyothisha.
In Jyotisha, the predictions (Phalabhaga) are written are
written as per individual knowledge.
